Who We Are

Creating Exceptional Spaces That Inspire

Eclectic Seals Int'l specialises in delivering premium construction, luxury interiors, renovations, property solutions, and building supplies that combine functionality with timeless aesthetics. Every project we undertake, from a private residence in Asokoro to a corporate headquarters in Maitama, is shaped by the same discipline: precise planning, honest materials, and craftsmanship that holds up for decades.

Our multidisciplinary team works across the full lifecycle of a property — design, build, finish, and manage — so our clients deal with a single, accountable partner from concept to handover.

About Us Request Quote

Comprehensive Building & Property Solutions

Landscaping

Learn More

Construction Supplies

Premium materials sourced and delivered for projects of any scale.

Why Eclectic Seals

Why Clients Choose Eclectic Seals Int’l

Experienced Professionals

A multidisciplinary team of architects, engineers, and designers with decades of combined experience.

Superior Craftsmanship

Every joint, finish and fixture is executed to a standard we'd accept in our own homes.

Quality Materials

We specify and, where possible, manufacture the materials that go into your project.

On-Time Delivery

Realistic schedules, tracked weekly, and communicated to you at every stage.

Transparent Pricing

Detailed quotations with no hidden costs and clear payment milestones.

Customer Satisfaction

A 95% client satisfaction rate built on listening first and building second.

How We Work

Our Process

01

Initial Consultation

We listen to your brief, goals and budget.

02

Site Inspection

Our team assesses the site and constraints.

03

Design & Planning

Concepts, drawings and material specs are developed.

04

Quotation

A transparent, itemised quote is issued.

05

Project Execution

Work proceeds to schedule with regular updates.

06

Quality Inspection

Every stage is checked against our quality standards.

07

Project Delivery

Handover, walkthrough and after-sales support.
